mapper.sql: id, user_id, agent_id, title, content, version, description, file_path, file_size, mime_type, tags, category, is_public, download_count, like_count, metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memories (user_id, agent_id, title, content, version, description, file_path, file_size, mime_type, tags, category, is_public, download_count, like_count, metadata) VALUES (#{userId}, #{agentId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{version}, #{description}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{tags}, #{category}, #{isPublic}, #{downloadCount}, #{likeCount}, #{metadata})
mapper.update: UPDATE memories SET user_id = #{userId}, agent_id = #{agentId}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, version = #{version}, description = #{description}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, tags = #{tags}, category = #{category}, is_public = #{isPublic}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, metadata = #{metadata} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM memories ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM memories WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM memories WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM memories WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM memories WHERE is_public = #{isPublic} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM memories WHERE MATCH(title, content, tags) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM memories WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE memories SET content = #{content}, version = #{version}, description = #{description}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_size = #{fileSize}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, tags = #{tags}, category = #{category}, is_public = #{isPublic}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, like_count = #{likeCount}, metadata = #{metadata} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId} AND title = #{title}
